search.query: | mstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_bytes_in WHERE `netflow_metrics_index` nfc_id=20067 | `set_span`

| mstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_bytes_in WHERE `netflow_metrics_index` nfc_id=20067 nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" $span_token$ BY nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip src_host src_port dest_ip dest_host dest_port protocol | search (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` ta_netflow_protocol_lookup protocol_id as protocol OUTPUT transport | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | eval bytes = sum_bytes_in*2 | timechart limit=10 $span_token$ eval(sum(bytes)*8/$span_int$/1000000) by exp_ip_name useother="f"

| mstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_bytes_in sum(packets_in) as sum_packets_in WHERE `netflow_metrics_index` nfc_id=20067 nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" BY nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip src_host src_port dest_ip dest_host dest_port protocol | eventstats sum(sum_bytes_in) as sum_by_exp by exp_ip nfo_hostname | search (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` ta_netflow_protocol_lookup protocol_id as protocol OUTPUT transport | fillnull value="" transport src_host | search transport="$protocol_name$" | stats sum(sum_bytes_in) as TrafficAmount sum(sum_packets_in) as PacketsAmount by nfo_hostname exp_ip sum_by_exp | sort 0 - TrafficAmount | head 100 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | eval TrafficSpeed=AverageSpeed/1000000 | eval pct = TrafficAmount*100/sum_by_exp | `commas_formatting(pct, pct, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps,TrafficSpeed*2, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Packets/s,PacketsSpeed*2,2)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | table nfo_hostname exp_ip_name "Average Mbps" pct "Average Packets/s" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename pct as "% of Total" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO"

chart.title: Device Traffic Details: $Device$ reported by NFO $NFO$

search.query: | mstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_bytes_in WHERE `netflow_metrics_index` nfc_id=20067 nfo_hostname="$NFO$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" $span_token$ BY nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip src_host src_port dest_ip dest_host dest_port input_snmp output_snmp protocol | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | search exp_ip_name="$Device$" (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` ta_netflow_protocol_lookup protocol_id as protocol OUTPUT transport | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name exp_isnmp | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name exp_osnmp | eval snmps=exp_isnmp+","+exp_osnmp | eval snmps=split(snmps,",") | timechart limit=10 $span_token$ eval(sum(sum_bytes_in)*8/$span_int$/1000000) by snmps useother="f"

| mstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_bytes_in sum(packets_in) as sum_packets_in WHERE `netflow_metrics_index` nfc_id=20067 nfo_hostname="$NFO$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" BY nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip src_host src_port dest_ip dest_host dest_port protocol input_snmp output_snmp | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | eventstats sum(sum_bytes_in) as sum_by_exp by exp_ip nfo_hostname | search exp_ip_name="$Device$" (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` ta_netflow_protocol_lookup protocol_id as protocol OUTPUT transport | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | eval snmps=input_snmp+","+output_snmp | eval snmps=split(snmps,",") | stats sum(sum_bytes_in) as TrafficAmount sum(sum_packets_in) as PacketsAmount by exp_ip snmps nfo_hostname sum_by_exp | `get_iface_speed(snmp_speed, snmps)` | `get_iface_name(snmp_name, snmps)` | eval pct = TrafficAmount*100/sum_by_exp | eval pct = pct/2 | `commas_formatting(pct, pct, 2)` | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval TrafficSpeed=AverageSpeed/1000000 | eval percOfUsage = round(TrafficSpeed/(snmp_speed*1000000)*100, 2) | sort - percOfUsage TrafficSpeed | head 100 | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | eval percOfUsage = if(isnull(percOfUsage), "", tostring(percOfUsage)+"%") | `commas_formatting(Average Packets/s, PacketsSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB, TrafficAmount)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | eval snmps = exp_ip_name."/".snmp_name | table snmps "Average Mbps" percOfUsage pct "Average Packets/s" | rename snmps as "Device/Interface" | rename percOfUsage as "% of Usage" | rename pct as "% of Total"

table.title: Interface Traffic Details: "$Device/Interface$" reported by NFO $NFO$

search.query: | mstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_bytes_in sum(packets_in) as sum_packets_in WHERE `netflow_metrics_index` nfc_id=20067 nfo_hostname="$NFO$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" BY nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip src_host src_port dest_ip dest_host dest_port protocol input_snmp output_snmp | eventstats sum(sum_bytes_in) as sum_by_exp by exp_ip nfo_hostname | search (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` ta_netflow_protocol_lookup protocol_id as protocol OUTPUT transport | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name exp_isnmp | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name exp_osnmp | search ( exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$" OR exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$" ) | eval DirectionIN=if(exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$","In","") | eval DirectionOUT=if(exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$","Out","") | eval Direction=DirectionIN+","+DirectionOUT | makemv Direction delim="," | stats sum(sum_bytes_in) as TrafficAmount sum(sum_packets_in) as PacketsAmount by exp_ip Direction sum_by_exp | eval TrafficSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | eval TrafficSpeed = TrafficSpeed/1000000 | eval pct = TrafficAmount*100/sum_by_exp | eval pct = pct/2 | `commas_formatting(pct, pct, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Packets/s, PacketsSpeed, 2)` | table Direction "Average Mbps" pct "Average Packets/s" | rename pct as "% of Total"

| mstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_bytes_in WHERE `netflow_metrics_index` nfc_id=20067 nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" $span_token$ BY nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip src_host src_port dest_ip dest_host dest_port protocol input_snmp output_snmp | eventstats sum(sum_bytes_in) as sum_by_exp by exp_ip nfo_hostname | search (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` ta_netflow_protocol_lookup protocol_id as protocol OUTPUT transport | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp)` | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp)` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name exp_isnmp | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name exp_osnmp | search ( exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$" OR exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$" ) | eval DirectionIN=if(exp_isnmp="$Device/Interface$","In","") | eval DirectionOUT=if(exp_osnmp="$Device/Interface$","Out","") | eval Direction=DirectionIN+","+DirectionOUT | makemv Direction delim="," | timechart limit=10 $span_token$ eval(sum(sum_bytes_in)*8/$span_int$/1000000) by Direction useother="f"

table.title: Conversations Traffic Details: "$Device/Interface$/$Direction$" reported by NFO $NFO$

search.query: | mstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_bytes_in sum(packets_in) as sum_packets_in sum(flow_count) as sum_flow_count WHERE `netflow_metrics_index` nfc_id=20067 nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" BY nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip src_host src_port dest_ip dest_host dest_port protocol input_snmp output_snmp | eventstats sum(sum_bytes_in) as sum_by_exp by exp_ip nfo_hostname | search (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` ta_netflow_protocol_lookup protocol_id as protocol OUTPUT transport | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | eval exp_snmp_dir = "$Device/Interface$/$Direction$" | `get_iface_name(output_snmp_name, output_snmp )` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" output_snmp_name "/Out" exp_osnmp | `get_iface_name(input_snmp_name, input_snmp )` | strcat exp_ip_name "/" input_snmp_name "/In" exp_isnmp | where (exp_snmp_dir == exp_isnmp) OR (exp_snmp_dir == exp_osnmp) | stats sum(sum_bytes_in) as TrafficAmount sum(sum_packets_in) as PacketsAmount sum(sum_flow_count) as Connections by src_ip dest_ip src_host dest_host src_port dest_port transport exp_ip sum_by_exp | sort 0 - TrafficAmount | head 100 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | eval pct = TrafficAmount*100/sum_by_exp | `format_port_column(src_port_string, src_port)` | `format_port_column(dest_port_string, dest_port)` | eval TrafficSpeed=AverageSpeed/1000000 | eval TrafficAmount=TrafficAmount/1024/1024 | `commas_formatting(Total Connections, Connections, 0)` | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB, TrafficAmount, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Average Packets/s, PacketsSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Packets, PacketsAmount, 0)` | table src_ip src_host src_port_string dest_ip dest_host dest_port_string "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" "Average Packets/s" "Total Packets" "Total Connections" | rename src_ip as "Source IP" src_host as "Source Host" src_port_string as "Source Port" | rename dest_ip as "Destination IP" dest_host as "Destination Host" dest_port_string as "Destination Port"

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the receiving of metrics data is not configured. For more information, please see the Metrics index section of the App Setup and TA Setup dashboards.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module â€ś10067: Top Traffic Monitorâ€ť (syslogs with nfc_id=20067). This Module identifies hosts with the most traffic. It consolidates NetFlow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol, Input interface, Output interface. This Module is packaged in NFO â€śNetwork Traffic and Devices Monitorâ€ť Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
